data.title: Trump Leads In Swing State Pennsylvania: Did McDonald's Shift Help Support In 2024 Election Poll?
data.description: A new 2024 election poll shows Donald Trump with a small lead in Pennsylvania. Did the McDonald's visit help his chances of winning the state?

data.title: If Trump Wins 2024 Election In Landslide, Bettors Could Make 5X, 20X Their Bets At UK Sportsbook
data.description: Election polls show a close Trump-Harris race, but prediction markets and betting odds favor a decisive Trump win in the 2024 presidential election.

data.title: Biden Administration Approves First Lithium Project
data.description: The Biden Administration on Thursday issued final approval for Ioneer's lithium mine, a big step toward bringing battery material sourcing to the U.S.

data.title: Boeing Reports $6B Q3 Loss: 'This Is The Bottom,' Says Analyst
data.description: Troubled aerospace giant Boeing reported a $6 billion third-quarter loss on Wednesday, the company's largest since 2020.
